hero.badge: 7 days free trial — no credit card required
hero.subheadline: Tell us what you need to move and receive quotes from trusted companies in your area — simple, fast and no commitment.

features.title: Everything to organize your move stress-free
features.subtitle: From planning to choosing the company, all in one place.

items.title: List everything you need to move
items.description: Add your furniture and boxes simply and see everything organized in one place. No spreadsheets, no paper.

items.title: Choose the right size without guessing
items.description: Find out which truck fits your move without overpaying for unnecessary space. We do the math for you.

items.title: Compare and choose with confidence
items.description: See prices, reviews and choose the best option for your move. Clear and transparent, no surprises.

items.title: Over 40 items ready to use
items.description: Bed, sofa, fridge, boxes and more — already listed and organized by room. Just select what you have.

items.title: See how much is already organized
items.description: Track in real time the total volume and space used in the truck. You know exactly what fits before booking.

items.title: Only trusted companies
items.description: All carriers are verified and have real reviews from other customers. You choose with peace of mind.

howItWorks.title: Organize your move in a few steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Fast, simple and hassle-free.

steps.title: Tell us about your move
steps.desc: Share where you're moving from and to, and what you need to take.

steps.title: Organize your items
steps.desc: List your furniture and see everything clearly organized.

steps.title: Receive quotes
steps.desc: Compare prices and choose the best company.

steps.title: Book with peace of mind
steps.desc: Arrange everything directly with your chosen carrier.

testimonials.title: Those who use it,
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of people have already planned their move with peace of mind. Once they use it, they never want to move the old way again.

items.text: I organized everything in less than 1 hour. The price transparency gave me a confidence I never had in other moves.
I knew exactly what would fit in the truck before even booking. I never thought planning a move could be this easy.
Our first move and it was perfect. No price surprises, no improvising. Highly recommend!

pricing.title: Start free and upgrade when you need
pricing.subtitle: No commitment. You only pay when you want more features.
